title: Dawn of the Living Chickens summons hand creatures as Limited Summons

card.rawText: Summon up to 4 creatures from your hand as Limited Summons. Return them back to your hand after 1 turn cycle.

effect.target: Up to 4 creatures from your hand

plan.title: Dawn of the Living Chickens summons hand creatures as Limited Summons
plan.summary: Play Dawn of the Living Chickens and verify hand creatures can be Limited Summoned.

notes: Player_1 has four creatures in hand.
Summon up to 4 creatures from your hand as Limited Summons.

steps: Play Dawn of the Living Chickens.
Resolve the Limited Summon target prompt.
Verify at least one hand creature becomes a Limited Summon.

expectedAssertions.label: Dawn summon used hand Limited Summon action

manualVerification: The full card allows up to 4 creatures; this fixture verifies the reusable hand Limited Summon route.
